name: HG Holdings, Inc.
summary: HG Holdings, Inc. operates through wholly owned subsidiaries providing title insurance and title agency services, primarily in Florida. Through National Consumer Title Insurance Company (NCTIC), it underwrites land title insurance for owners and mortgagees. Its agency subsidiaries (NCTG, TAV, ONTA, ONF, ONP) provide title agency, closing, and escrow services for residential and commercial real estate transactions. The company also holds an equity investment in HC Government Realty Trust, Inc. and provides management advisory services to affiliates.
